allow: Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const names = Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => [''SiLinkedin'',''SiAirtable'',''SiN8n'',''SiMake'',''SiApify'',''SiApollo'',''SiHubspot''].includes\(k\)\); console.log\(names.join\('', ''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); const targets = [''linkedin'',''airtable'',''n8n'',''make'',''apify'',''apollo'',''clay'',''smartlead'',''instantly'',''heyreach'']; targets.forEach\(t => { const found = keys.find\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(t\)\); console.log\(t + '':'', found || ''NOT FOUND''\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); [''SiLinkedin'',''SiLinkedIn'',''SiN8N'',''SiMake'',''SiZapier'',''SiNotion'',''SiSlack''].forEach\(k => console.log\(k, '':'', !!si[k]\)\);")
